note: Mathlib/RingTheory/Polynomial/ShiftedLegendre.lean:37 `noncomputable def shiftedLegendre (n : Nat) : ZZ[X] := ...`; docstring 'shifted Legendre polynomials' with Rodrigues'-formula analogue, references https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Legendre_polynomials directly. verify_note: Decl confirmed in oracle + mathlib4 checkout; source docstring literally says 'shifted Legendre polynomials' on [0,1] with a Rodrigues'-analogue and cites the Wikipedia Legendre_polynomials article; no plain Polynomial.legendre exists in Mathlib, so this is the closest available decl and the note correctly declines to call it 'exact' -- honest, non-overclaiming use of 'related'.
